series_description: Record series consists of meter readings of printing equipment used for the production of print jobs in State Printing & Mail Services.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain on department G: drive for three years

series_description: Worksheets and analysis of rate schedules. These are necessary so that compliance with SWCAP obligations can be achieved.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain electronically for 4 years ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically

series_description: Copy Center, Mainframe Printing and Fulfillment Services Job tickets used to submit order specifications to State Printing and Mail Services.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain two years scanned to SFTP server. ; Paper: Retain onsite one year

series_description: DAS / Credit Card request & receipt files consisting of Credit Card Request and Credit Card Receipt Forms (ADM-3908).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until stored electronically ; Electronic: Retain in office 2 years after cancellation of account

series_description: Lease file copies consisting of monthly Lease Invoices (Elements: vehicle number, agency, mileage, driver, rate formula and total charges).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating area for Two (2) Fiscal Years ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically

series_title: Annual Agency Credit Card Billing Invoice File
series_description: Copies of Credit Card Annual Billing Invoices for each user agency consisting of the agency name, credit card account number, number of cards on the account, rate calculation and the total annual charge.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating area for Two (2) Fiscal Years ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically

series_description: Copies of the current and previous fiscal years billing units for each month and the annual Billing Units Summary statements. Also contains a copy of the annual agency invoice.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating area until superseded by a new Fleet Billings Memo ; Paper: Retain until electronically stored

series_description: The original approved Application for Eligibility form denoting eligible purchasers of surplus property, address of agency, telephone number.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retained in Salesforce and renewed every 3 years.

series_description: Register notebook used for items exceeding $5000 and for vehicles only. One copy is given to the donee for their records and one copy is kept in the register book. This register paper contains: register number, date of acquisition, holding agency, OSN, warehouse price, nomenclature and any pertinent information pertaining to them, i.e. mfg., mileage, year, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintained in Salesforce.

series_description: This series contains working papers dealing with negotiations; correspondence dealing with certificates of participation to and from using agencies and to and form Society Bank & Bank One (who are the trustees and are responsible for disbursement of funds). In order to buy equipment (computer & microwave) certificates are sold to raise money. Computer Services then pays the bank who in turn pays the certificate holders.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain five (5) years after closeout of payment

series_description: This series consists of a Invitation to Bid (ADM-3214) listing the agency name, bidders name, description and specifications of the bid and the bid number submitted by all vendors for a specific project. Included are working papers, copies of corresponde
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area for 1 fiscal year after all proposals (successful and unseccessful) have been submitted

series_description: This series consists of a computer generated printout which lists the circuit number, agency name, address, phone number and operational hours of the location of the circuit. It lists what type of trouble (problems) with the circuit and the repairs made
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating area until superseded ; Paper: Retain in office area 1 year

series_description: This report (original) consists of jobs which have to be rerun due to Copy Center error with no additional charge to the ordering agency. Indicates a description of problem, solution to the problem, and any additional comments.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area for one (1) fiscal year

series_description: Consists of log sheet information entered into Avanti program from Print Request Order containing agency name and job number of printed material produced in the Copy Center.
retention_statement: Paper: After scanned to SFTP server, paper documents can be destroyed. ; Electronic: Retain 3 fiscal years after scanned to SFTP server.

series_description: Copies of Fleet Management Chargeback files consisting of DAS/Invoice (ADM 7008) and copies of the Vendor receipts. Fleet Management pays all bills for damage to leased or rental vehicles.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating area for Two (2) Fiscal Years ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically

series_description: Weekly reports from Copy Centers listing number of jobs produced, start and completion date, code for machine job was run on, and employee name who completed job.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for one (1) fiscal year ; Electronic: Retain for one (1) fiscal year

series_description: This series contains contracts (some original, some copies for leasing, purchase, personal service, maintenance, software, lease/purchase etc. for the telecommunications section of coputer services.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area until all audit issues have been resolved and all equipment has been removed or replaced.

series_title: State of Ohio Front Web Pages
series_description: Front pages from the State of Ohio website created by the DAS Office of Information Systems Policy & Planning (OPP). May include Governor & Lt. Governor pages created by OPP and supporting documentation such as web page best practices, site statistics etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Appraise by State for historical value when pages undergo substantial changes

series_title: Certificate of Title to a Motor Vehicle
series_description: Motor vehicle titles released from all state agencies.
retention_statement: Paper: Scanned into Salesforce

series_description: Copies of correspondence and all related material associated with the annual vehicle inventory certification.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office five years ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically

series_title: Acquisitions Management Rate/Budget Documentation & Transfer File
series_description: This series consists of copies of rate setting documents; expense reports; working papers on budget documentation; allotment encumbrance detail; the transfer of the unit from computer services to office services.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area one (1) fiscal year, transfer to storage for two (2) fiscal years

series_description: This series consists of a letter sent to vendors outlining a specific project and asking the vendor to submit a proposal as to how the project will be managed and the cost of the project. After all proposals are submitted a decision is made by the unit a
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area for 1 fiscal year after all proposals have been received

series_description: Biennial computer utilization reports submitted to OPP from each state agency. Includes major business applications, operating envitonments, software & hardware utilized, and information technology personnel information.
retention_statement: Electronic: Permanent, transfer to State Archives ; Paper: Permanent, transfer to State Archives

series_description: Record series consists of log sheets listing the agency name, job number, and number of boxes of printed material produced and delivered by the Copy Center.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for one (1) fiscal year ; Electronic: Retain for one (1) fiscal year

series_description: This series consists of working papers, proposals, invitation to bid (ADM-500), registered mail receipts, and copies of correspondence and monthly updates. Used to develop and track progress of this system.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area 5 years after date of receipt ; Electronic: Retain in office area 5 years after date of receipt

series_description: Original Statewide Credit Card Receipt & Request files by agency consisting of Credit Card Control Form (ADM 3908) and Credit Card Acknowledgement Letter (NFN).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until stored electronically ; Electronic: Retain in office five years

series_description: This series consists of printouts which list time and locations of interruptions at microwave sites.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office are 6 months

series_description: This series contains: copies of pre-approval letters which grant user agencies covered by State Term Contracts a number so that they can use the contract programmers. Included with this are working papers and copies of correspondence. All orignal mater
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area for 1 fiscal year

series_description: Series contains original financial statements for Pay Agency Funds, Workforce Development and HRMS.
retention_statement: Paper: Keep in office for ten (10) years plus the current year

series_title: State Printing Request for Paper and Materials
series_description: Used as a purchase order to draw from a general encumbrance. Request lists: description of materials to be purchased, bill to/ship to addresses, quantity, price, contract number (if applicable), and internal identification number.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in electronic form for three years

series_description: Applications for disability leave benefits, including documentation submitted in support of applications and extensions; determinations; appeal records; hearing files; correspondence relating to claims.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until stored electronically and ; Electronic: Retain 7 years after a hearing, if no hearing, retain for 2 years after claim closed.

series_title: Criminal Justice Network Manager Administration File
series_description: Reports on the downtime and problems on the OCJN sysstem copies of operations logs indicating those problems, copies of purchas ing documents for new, replacement, or additional equipment for the system, status reports of purchase requests and system upgrades, along with Problem Logs, copies of proposed tables of organization, proposed personnel upgrades or changes.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area for 1 year

series_description: Documents pertaining to all lease agreements, maintenance agreements, and state contracts solicited by DAS that are not covered by PUR-01 or PUR-02
retention_statement: Electronic: Awarded Contracts: 6 calendar years after expiration of contract

series_description: This series contains: Federal Forms OARS-3 A, OARS-30, OARS-51, SSA-3961 and SSA-3964 used to report earnings of and deposits made for employees in participating entities in the Social Security Participation Program (University of Cincinnati, Toledo Mudhens)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in storage facility for Fifty (50) years

series_description: Visitor sign in sheets containing date, visitor name, sign-in time, person/section destination, and sign-out time for all facilities except SOCC. Used to monitor non-building personnel.
retention_statement: Electronic: Keep in operating system for 30 days (except for SOCC retain for 5 years).

series_description: Reports detailing investigations of incidents in DAS buildings monitored by GSD/Security. Reports contain time, date, parties involved, description of incident and action taken. Reports are used to protect the rights of individuals involved in the incident and to show compliance with DAS security procedures and policy.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain five (5) years in operating system after case is closed or dropped

series_description: Original copy of emergency action plan for DAS/GSD, 4200 Surface Road. Contains procedures, protocols and emergency information needed in a a crisis.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded ; Paper: Retain until superseded

series_description: Daily email from officers and radio operators to supervisors containing shift activity.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain one year

series_description: Series consists of sign out logs that document what keys were signed out and who signed them out.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office for one year

series_description: Working papers consisting of notes, working drafts and schedules, and copies of GAAP forms used to support all entries in the agency's closing package for GAAP reporting, including date computations, analysis, justifications, recommended adjustments for GAAP reporting and other related information.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until stored electronically ; Electronic: Retain electronically for four fiscal years

series_description: This series consists of information on wide area network connections to state networks.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system until superseded

series_description: This series consists of an electronic directory of each network customer, the address of each terminal, and the contact person''s name and address.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system until superseded

series_description: This series consists of information used to track equipment throughout the state.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system until superseded

series_description: This series consists of records that provide domain name service (DNS) for the state.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system until superseded

series_description: This series consists of information on video services and locations.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system until superseded

series_description: This series consists of information on network locations, the type of problem they are experiencing with a circuit, and the repairs made to the circuit by Network Operations.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system until superseded

series_description: This series consists of requests for numbers to be added to subgroups.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system 3 years ; Paper: Retain in office area 3 years

series_description: This series consists of reports of phone line problems, feature problems, CCMIS system problems, voicemail problems, auto attendant problems and all other voice problems that need to be tracked.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain phone line problems for 2 years, all others for the length of the contract

series_description: This series contains originals/copies of incoming and outgoing general correspondence for the Telephone Operations section. Electronic documents are maintained in variou formats (Word, Access, Excel, Text, Powerpoint, PDF).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system for 2 years ; Paper: Retain in office area for 2 years

series_description: This series contains originals/copies of incoming and outgoing general correspondence for the Network Services Administration section. Electronic documents are maintained in various formats (Word, Access, Excel, Text, Powerpoint, PDF).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system for 2 years ; Paper: Retain in office area for 2 years

series_description: Reports prepared by office staff that document ongoing agency activities and projects
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until stored electronically ; Electronic: Retain for one year

series_description: Series consists of an Enterprise Management configuration and data records.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system adn on magnetic tape until superceded

series_description: This file consists of Computer Services, Human Resources, General Services, Equal Opportunity and Administrative Support. Will include all forms of correspondence, resource material and other material relating to the operation of the divisions either generated or received by the office of Communications.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office one year and ; Electronic: Retain in operating system for one year and

series_description: Includes published reports, unpublished substantive reports and policy studies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Annual report and other published periodic reports on agency activities.
retention_statement: Paper: Upon publication, fulfil the requirements of ORC 149.11. Destroy excess copies when no longer of administrative value.

series_description: Series consists of e-mail, customer updates and network design diagrams related to project that are being worked on by the Network Operations section.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until project is complete, abandoned or relinquished

series_description: Series consists of paper and/or e-mail related to projects that are being worked on for the Geographic Information System program.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area or operating system for 2 years or for the duration of the project ; Electronic: Retain in office area or operating system for 2 years or for duration of the project

series_description: Series consists of a log file or history of trading partner transmissions. Customer is responsible for keeping a backup of original trading partner payload or data files.
retention_statement: Electronic: Keep on server for 90 days

series_description: Series consists of original records requests for licensing ownership information. Used to provide database information.
retention_statement: Paper: Keep in work area for two years

series_description: Series consists of all documentation and correspondence, both hard copy and electronic, between state and its employees and the medical TPAs. Series contains general correspondence, email, handouts, booklets, and information contained within the Benefits website.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for current year plus 4 prior fiscal benefit year periods ; Paper: Retain for current year plus 4 prior fiscal benefit year periods

series_description: Series consists of all documentation and correspondence, both hard copy and electronic, between state and its employees and the pharmacy benefit manager. Series contains general correspondence, email, handouts, booklets, and information contained within the Benefits website.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for current year plus 4 prior fiscal benefit year periods ; Paper: Retain for current year plus 4 prior fiscal benefit year periods

series_description: Series consists of all documentation and correspondence, both hard copy and electronic, between open enrollment team members, the state and its employees, all communication materials, presentations, all correspondence between the state and any printing vendor, and all correspondence between the state and its third-party administrators.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for current year plus 2 prior fiscal benefit year periods ; Electronic: Retain for current year plus 2 prior fiscal benefit year periods

series_title: Certificate to Obtain Title to Vehicle
series_description: Original copy of Certificate to Obtain Title to a Vehicle which is issued by the holding agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Scanned into Salesforce

series_description: Electronic database listing lessor name and address; user agency; agency contact person; rent dollars, service dollars, and total dollars involved; services provided; effective date and final expiration date of lease.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, updated, or replaced ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically

series_description: Voyager is the accounting system for FleetOhio, a comprehensive fleet management information system that allows organizations to capture and analyze all costs associated with owning and operating a fleet of vehicles. Series covers account files for Fleet purchasing and billing records. Account information consists of monthly inventory files that become billing units. Voyager billing units are monthly inventory files (896 files) pulled from Voyager, which is the fiscal accounting mainframe, and are used to interact with account holder invoice files (865 files) from Fleet Commander that are uploaded from FleetOhio.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until stored electronically ; Electronic: Retain in office for five (5) years

series_description: Series of security processes published by OIT consisting of original procedure, sign-off sheets, and internal corresponcence.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office area for 5 years after it is superceded or rescinded ; Paper: Retain in office area for 5 years after it is superceded or rescinded

series_title: IT Reports and Studies Support Documentation
series_description: This series contains support documents for published and internal IT reports and studies. Series includes policy recommendation memo, drafts, correspondence, research, working group rosters, minutes, surveys, reveiw drafts,and recommendations, and news releases.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office area for 1 year after the IT report or study it supports is superseded, obsolete or rescinded ; Paper: Retain in office area for 1 year after the IT report or study it supports is superseded, obsolete or rescinded

series_description: This report is used by State agencies using electronic signatures for high or very high risk transactions. They must file with OIT an electronic transaction report that describes the risk and security technologies and procedures to be implemented and show that the electronic transaction is in compliance with administrative rule 123:3-1-01 on electronic signatures.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office area for 5 years after it has been superseded or recinded ; Paper: Retain in office area for 5 years after it has been superseded or recinded

series_description: OIT may waive strict compliance with administrative rule 123:3-1-01 for a given electronic transaction under certain conditions. This report is a list of state agencies granted permission to waive compliance with the administrative rule.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office area for 5 years after it has been superseded or rescinded ; Paper: Retain in office area for 5 years after it has been superseded or rescinded

series_title: Software Copyright (ITP-A.26) Compliance Plans and Plan Updates
series_description: Series covers compliance plans and updates regarding the State of Ohio IT Policy ITP-A.26, requiring state agencies to establish controls for the use and protection of licensed software required to conduct official state business.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office area for 1 year after it is superseded or rescinded ; Paper: Retain in office area for 1 year after it is superseded or rescinded

series_description: Job audits (NFN) with completed employee section, supervisor section, and position description. Also, the request for job audit letter, technicians report & Agency notification.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 3 years from date communicated to parties ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years from date communicated to parties

series_description: Point Factor Evaluations used for determining compensation, interview notes, allocation lists, specification development forms for duties, minimum qualifications, and original classification specification to be updated.
retention_statement: Paper: Indefinite. ; Electronic: Indefinite.

series_description: Minutes from the Internet Advisory Committee (IAC) meetings.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_title: State Surplus Sale Number Assignment Book
series_description: This consists of a log from which State Surplus Sales numbers are assigned. The information listed is date of sale, type of sale, purchaser's name (agency or individual), county of purchaser, sale number, total amount of sale, and license number, if a vehicle. Types of sales involved are: Sale of the Month; tax-supported agencies; Ohio State Patrol Vehicles sold; and sealed bids. (location sales).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 fiscal years in operating system

series_description: Distribution copies of purchase orders, repair invoices, and history information of material handling equipment, shredder and baler, and office machines used by the unit.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 fiscal years in operating system

series_description: A ledger that lists vehicles released to State Surplus with the following information: license number (reveals agency by prefix), year, make, model, odometer reading (mileage), and serial number.
retention_statement: Paper: Scanned into Salesforce

series_description: Register notebook used for items exceeding $5000 and for vehicles only. One copy is given to the donee for their records and one copy is kept in the register book. This register paper contains: register number, date of acquisition, holding agency, OSN, warehouse price, nomenclature and any pertinent information pertaining to them, i.e. mfg., mileage, year, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area for 3 years after Federal Review

series_description: Log containing Ohio State Number (OSN), holding agency, number from screeners list, date requested government acquisition price. When property is approved for pickup by GSA then add: amount of items received, whether withdrawn by holding agency and amount of monies withdrawn, rejection and reason if applicable, any direct transfer and dollar amount of overages and/or shortages. Used to track federal property by its OSN.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system for 3 years after Federal review

series_description: Copies of Donation Screening List (Form 120 - State Screener's Report) which is produced by the government holding agency and lists available surplus items. Lists indicates property stock number, the turn-in document number, condition of the item(s), number of items, the price of the items and the release date, acquisition cost, set-aside date and nomenclature, then uses a Transfer Order Surplus Personal Property ( Form 123) requesting the property available listed on the Form 120, transferring the information used from Form 120 to Form 123. Signature from GSA is required. These forms comprise the record of all property procurements by FSP.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system for 3 years after Federal Review ; Paper: Retain in operating system for 3 years after Federal Review

series_description: This log lists all agencies receiving direct transfer of property. Listed here are nomenclature, goverment holding agency, government acquisition costs, Ohio State Number (OSN), and transfer price plus date of transfer and invoice. This log is used for transferring property from the holding agency directly to the donee without ever being here at the surplus warehouse.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system for three years after the Federal review

series_description: The bid opening log, guest sign-in sheet for reviewing bid openings, closed requests to view bids. Will be replaced by OhioBuys.
retention_statement: Paper: In office two calendar years ; Electronic: In office two calendar years

series_description: Published Ohio IT (Information Technology) policies, enterprise architecture, standards, bulletins, and proposed administrative rules filed with JCARR (Joint Committee on Agency Rule Review) - includes signature pages.
retention_statement: Electronic: Upon publication, send copy to the State Library. Retain in office area for 5 years after it is superseded or rescinded ; Paper: Upon publication, send copy to the State Library. Retain in office area for 5 years after it is superseded or rescinded

series_description: An Excel file which is used to determine payroll assessment charges, showing the total disbursed by the Director's account by object category and the total payroll amount and percent by fund and department ID. Support files are saved on shared network drive and summary level information is retained in the OAKS Financial System.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain electronically for 5 years

series_description: Series of correspondence covering situations where Medicare has paid for an employee’s insurance claim as the primary pay instead of the secondary pay. Documents include correspondence between Human Resources Benefit office, the insurance carrier, Medicare and collection agencies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until the case is closed plus 5 years ; Electronic: Retain until the case is closed plus 5 years

series_description: This record series pertains to any document posted on the
retention_statement: Electronic: All of the above-mentioned documents will be maintained for a minimum of one calendar year following determination by the Data Privacy Point of Contact (DPPOC) that DAS has completed full implementation of ORC 1347.15. Documents may be kept longer if administratively necessary.

series_title: Drug Free Workplace Positive Testing Results
series_description: Consists of Federal & State Positive Drug/Alcohol Results, Return to Duty & Follow-Up results, Chain of Custody Forms, monthly schedules, positive tracking log & agency testing notifications.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain current year and five previous years ; Electronic: Retain current year and five previous years

series_title: Drug Free Workplace Random Testing Rosters
series_description: Consists of Federal & State Random Drug/Alcohol Master Roster, Primary & Secondary Selection Lists & Tracking Logs.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain current year and two previous years ; Paper: Retain current year and two previous years

series_title: Property and Casualty Underwriting and Claim Files
series_description: Series contains correspondence, policies, schedules, collections, assets, reports, contacts, billing, and other underwriting documentation contained within the Origami Risk system. Series contains police reports; estimates; medical documentation; payment requests, case pleadings, and other miscellaneous correspondence and documents sent electronically and saved in the Origami Risk system as necessary to manage claims.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: This series contains: Childcare voucher application (ADM 4306) used to gather information needed to apply for childcare benefits, yearly summary reports, support documentation.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 1 year after the voucher is issued ; Paper: Retain for 1 year after the voucher is issued

series_description: Copies of proposal history (e.g., every proposal formally presented at the bargaining table), bargaining minutes or notes taken by the designated note taker(s), and tentative agreements. For fact-finding, pre-hearing statements, fact-finding proposals, fact-finding exhibits, transcript or notes from the proceeding, post-hearing briefs, and the report and recommendation of the fact-finder. For conciliation, pre-hearing statements, conciliation proposals, conciliation exhibits, transcript or notes from the proceeding, post-hearing briefs, and the conciliation report.
retention_statement: Electronic: Permanent retention in office area. ; Paper: Permanent retention in office area.

series_description: Copies of final negotiated contracts between each bargaining unit and the state. In addition to the final printed contract, file also includes any submission to the Controlling Board/Legislature (fiscal summary, summary of changes, and overview of the contract), and any side letters or letters of intent. Files may be in electronic form or paper.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office area for permanent retention. ; Paper: Retain in office area for permanent retention.

series_description: All documentation relating to the implementation of the biennial budget, including: copies of Analysis of Divisional Budgets during the biennium, copies of Allotment Adjustments during the biennium and other material relating to specific budget issues during the biennium.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until stored electronically ; Electronic: Retain electronically for 5 fiscal years after the close of the biennium

series_description: Series contains: Distribution copy of the Payroll Disbursement Journal
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office for 2 years

series_description: Records submitted as basis for enrolling/maintaining dependents in benefit program that could change over time. Includes federal tax return, marriage certificate, proof of joint residency, affidavit of common law marriage, certificate of common law marriage, adoption agency papers, custody agreements, foster child court documents, legal guardian court documents, qualified medical support order. HB1 affidavit, driver’s license, annual affidavit or student status letter from registrar.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain current year plus prior 2 years ; Electronic: Retain current year plus prior 2 years

series_description: Records submitted as basis for enrolling/maintaining dependents in benefit programs that do not change over time. Includes birth certificates, consular report of birth abroad of a citizen of USA or certification of birth abroad, adoption court documents, international adoption papers, and disabled dependent approval paperwork.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 1 year following separation of employment ; Paper: Retain 1 year following separation of employment

series_description: Records covering all documentation generated during the course of an ETMP review. Includes planning documents, narratives, diagrams, vulnerability assessments, penetration test checklists, tests, reports, correspondence, and agency review.
retention_statement: Electronic: After final agency review and sign-off, immediately destroy. ; Paper: Retain the three most recent agency/program-specific assessments. Send older assessments to secure storage facility for shredding.

series_description: Planning documents for proposed Investment Bovernance Department Budgets.
retention_statement: Electronic: Hold until budget is in effect

series_title: Office of Information Technology Procurement Documentation
series_description: Series covers Request for Quotes, vendor selection, and contract management.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office for one year

series_title: Office of Information Technology Project Documentation
series_description: Series consists of documents related to project charters, risk reports, status updates, & project requirements.
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain in operating system for 5 years after project is closed or decision is made not to implement. ; Paper: Maintain in office for 5 years after project is closed or decision is made not to implement.

series_title: Office of Information Technology PMO Contract Amendments
series_description: Series consists of residual documents from the Project Success Center to aid in the preparation of contract amendments.
retention_statement: Electronic: For sale of goods, retain 5 years after original contract date the amendment or change order addects

series_description: Legal correspondences with vendors or agencies regarding Project Success Center projects.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office for 6 months ; Paper: Retain in office for 6 months

series_description: Standards and Templates created by the Project Success Center for the office.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system for one year after being superceded.

series_title: Ohio Information Technology Policy Supporting Documents
series_description: This series includes copies of Correspondence, Drafts, Research, Work group collections to include rosters, minutes, surveys, review drafts and recommendations, Project plans, CIO Release for comment, Request to publish, Publication requests and notifications, Inquiries and Waivers and News releases.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain project packet in office area for five years after Ohio IT policy document it supports is superseded or rescinded ; Electronic: Retain project packet in office area for five years after Ohio IT policy document it supports is superseded or rescinded

series_description: Documents that summarize the results of in-depth research efforts on a particular information technology topic or topics. These reports and studies may be formally published on the Ohio.gov site and/or may be circulated to other agencies and/or DAS divisions.
retention_statement: Electronic: Upon publication, send copy to the State Lilbrary. Retain in office area for 1 year after it is superseded, obsolete or rescinded ; Paper: Upon publication, send copy to the State Lilbrary. Retain in office area for 1 year after it is superseded, obsolete or rescinded

series_description: Documents including: Policy recommendation memos, Drafts, Correspondence, Research, Working group documents(rosters, minutes, surveys, review drafts, recommendations), News releases.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office area for 1 year after it is superseded, obsolete or rescinded ; Paper: Retain in office area for 1 year after it is superseded, obsolete or rescinded

series_description: Responses that are submitted on behalf of OIT and the State of Ohio
retention_statement: Microform: Retain in office area for ten years

series_title: Filed Agency IT Resource Use Policies
series_description: Copies of IT resource use policies submitted to the Office of Information Technology by state agencies as required in Ohio IT Policy, ITP-E.8, "Use of Internet, E-mail and Other IT Resources"
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area for 1 year after it is superseded or rescinded ; Electronic: Keep in operating system for 1 year after it is superseded or rescinded

series_description: Documents indluding: signature authority forms and designated requistor forms.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office for ten Bienniums

series_description: Published agency IT plans.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superceded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Individual agency reports produced quarterly, illustrating the relationship between the agency''s budget, release and permits and OAKS vouchers.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system for 2 years

series_description: Includes: Composite FGA reports, Bluebook and Summary & Analysis.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office area for 1 year after it is superseded, obsolete or rescinded

series_description: Survey and results produced for Biennial Planning.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system for 10 years

series_description: Includes: ITIP Planning Guide, Information Technology Release and Permit Guide.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system until superceded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Processes created for functionality and roles of Investment Management Services staff.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system for 3 years

series_description: Correspondence pieces between Contract Management Program area and Vendors in Contract negotiations.
retention_statement: Electronic: For sale of goods, retain 5 years

series_description: All documents relating to State Term Schedules, Request for Purchase, MLA''s, MMA''s State of Works and Similar documents.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 10 state fiscal years after the expiration of the contract ; Paper: Retain for 10 state fiscal years after the expiration of the contract

series_description: Requests for records
retention_statement: Electronic: On network drive for life of the contract

series_description: Reports of DAS contributions to annual CCC, interim reports throughout campaign, and final annual results. Also contains copies of posters, brochures, pledge cards, report envelopes, handbooks, and other material used to conduct annual CCC.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until stored electronically ; Electronic: Retain electronically for 2 years

series_description: This series contains originals/copies of incoming and outgoing general correspondence for the Contract Management section. Electronic documents are maintained in various formats (Word, Access, Excel, Text, Powerpoint, PDF)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area for 2 years ; Electronic: Retain in operating system for 2 years

series_description: This series consists of e-mail related to projects that are being worked on by the Administration section.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until project is complete, abandoned or relinquished

series_description: Series consists of information on wide area network connections to state networks.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in operating system until superseded

series_description: This series consists of e-mail related to projects that are being worked on by the Contract Management section.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until project is complete, abandoned or relinquished

series_title: Transmission Control Protocol/Internet Protocol (TCP/IP) Access Form
series_description: Form for approving access to State of Ohio resources.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area for a minimum of 5 years

series_description: This series consists of competitive solicitations for network services, the ensuing responses from the vendors and all correspondence related to this activity.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area for two years ; Electronic: Retain in operating system area for two years

series_description: Series consists of an electronic directory of each network customer, the address of each terminal, and the contact person''s name and address.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in ticketing system until superseded

series_description: Series consists of information on video services and locations.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in ticketing/inventory system until superseded

series_description: Series consists of information on network locations, the type of problem they are experiencing with a circuit, and the repairs made to the circuit by Network Operations.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in ticketing system until superseded

series_description: Series consists of records that provide domain name service (DNS) for the state.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain on DNS servers until superseded

series_description: Series consists of logs on recordable firewall access. Not every type of access is logged.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain on syslog server, or in approved file share for 3 years

series_description: This series consists of information (agency names, employee names and titles, telephone and fax numbers, phone system features, voicemail instructions) for the State of Ohio phone directory.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office area/ phone system or file share for 1 year ; Paper: Retain in office area/ phone system or file share for 1 year

series_description: Documents related to the review or analysis of potential or proposed legislation and its impact on DAS.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until stored electronically ; Electronic: Retain 2 years after the end of the current general assembly

series_description: Record log of approved centralized Agency Position Descriptions.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for seven years from approval date ; Paper: Retain for seven years from approval date

series_description: This series consists of layoff rationale, verification of retention points, recall lists and applicable correspondence.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 7 years from the effective date of the layoff ; Electronic: Retain for 7 years from the effective date of the layoff

series_description: This series consists of letters from state agencies designating certain positions as unclassified in accordance with Chapter 124.11(A)(8) of the Ohio Revised Code and copies of DAS SHRD letters of acknowledgment of receipt.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 10 years after date of submission ; Paper: Retain for 10 years after date of submission

series_title: State Agency Personnel Action Signature Authorizations
series_description: This series consists of signature authorization forms with name of persons who have authorization to sign Personnel Actions (ePAR) for appointing authority for each Agency, Board & Commission.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 8 years after new appointing authority is designated ; Paper: Retain 8 years after new appointing authority is designated

series_title: State Wide Cost Allocation Plan (SWCAP) Report and Support Documents
series_description: SWCAP (State Wide Cost Allocation Plan) worksheets and analysis of rate schedules, including: final cost plan, OAKS division data, reports, schedules, division communication, Federal audit review, and communication letters & email in both print and electronic form. These are necessary so that compliance with SWCAP obligations can be achieved.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain electronically for 5 years after Federal audit review and approval ; Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_title: Competitive Contracts - Request for Proposal & Invitation to Bid
series_description: Series includes all Competitive, Response, Evaluation, Clarification, Award, Protest, Change Order, Amendment and Performance Bond documents related to Request for Proposal and Invitation to Bid competitive procurements. These documents to procure information technology hardware, software and services are created by Enterprise Information Technology Contracting during the life of the procurement. Paper records stored on-site or warehoused. Machine readable stored in contract management database. ORC 2305 applies to these records.
retention_statement: Electronic: "For sale of goods, retain five years after termination of the contract For services, retain nine years after termination of the contract, then destroy.* If the contract includes both goods and services, retain nine years after the termination of the contract then destroy. *Provided all contract issues are resolved." ; Paper: "For sale of goods, retain five years after termination of the contract For services, retain nine years after termination of the contract, then destroy.* If the contract includes both goods and services, retain nine years after the termination of the contract then destroy. *Provided all contract issues are resolved."

series_description: Series includes all information technology State Term Schedule Offer, Contract and Amendment documents. Series includes approved vendors and authorized dealers, products with pricing and terms including software licensing and maintenance warranties. Paper records stored on-site or warehoused. Machine readable stored in contract management database. ORC 2305 applies to these records.
retention_statement: Electronic: "For sale of goods, retain five years after termination of the contract For services, retain nine years after termination of the contract, " ; Paper: "For sale of goods, retain five years after termination of the contract For services, retain nine years after termination of the contract, "

series_description: Series includes all Offer, Contract and Amendment documents related to Master Maintenance Agreements. These documents cover information technology support services for hardware and software. Paper records stored on-site or warehoused. Machine readable stored in contract management database. ORC 2305 applies to these records.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain nine years after termination of the contract ; Paper: Retain nine years after termination of the contract

series_description: Series includes all Offer, Contract and Amendment documents related to Master Service Agreements. Series supports procurement of telecommunication products and services by the Enterprise Information Technology Contracting staff. Paper records stored on-site or warehoused. Machine readable stored in contract management database. ORC 2305 applies to these records.
retention_statement: Electronic: "For sale of goods, retain five years after termination of the contract For services, retain nine years after termination of the contract, " ; Paper: "For sale of goods, retain five years after termination of the contract For services, retain nine years after termination of the contract, "

series_description: Series includes all Offer, Contract and Amendment documents related to Master Cloud Service Agreements. This series supports hosting/cloud procurements by the Enterprise Information Technology Contracting staff. Paper records stored on-site or warehoused. Machine readable stored in contract management database.
retention_statement: Electronic: "For sale of goods, retain five years after termination of the contract For services, retain nine years after termination of the contract, " ; Paper: "For sale of goods, retain five years after termination of the contract For services, retain nine years after termination of the contract, "

series_description: Series includes all Contract and Amendment documents related to Master License Agreements. Master License agreements govern the relationships between software companies and state agencies using the products covered in the agreement. Paper records stored on-site or warehoused. Machine readable stored in contract management database.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain five years after the license is no longer being used. ; Paper: Retain five years after the license is no longer being used.

series_description: Series includes all generic format documents with mail merge capability related to information technology procurement stored within Omnicom contract management database.
retention_statement: Electronic: Delete from database when template becomes obsolete.

series_description: This series consists of corrections made to employee payroll.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain in operating system until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Documents pertaining to all state contracts, whether negotiated or solicited competitively, including, but not limited to: Request to Purchase, Release and Permit requests, the RFP/ITB, checklists, scoring, submitted proposals/bids, contract amendments, performance bonds, insurance information, Complaint to Vendor/Exception, Protest files.
retention_statement: Paper: In office for life of contract, destroyed after scanned. ; Electronic: On network drive or in OhioBuys for 8 calendar years after expiration of contract

series_title: Security Card Database for DAS Controlled Buildings
series_description: Electronic files containing dates and times when security access card is used at select entry points of DAS owned or leased buildings, restricted floors and /or offices controlled by building access security system.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in system for 30 days

series_title: Visitor Database to DAS Controlled Buildings
series_description: Electronic files containing dates and times when visitors enter select points of DAS owned or leased buildings, restricted floors and/or offices controlled by building access security system. Such files may contain visitor’s name and picture as retrieved from government-issued identification. Such files may also contain security risk information, some of which may be of long-term concern.
retention_statement: Electronic: Visitor Information Retain in system for 30 days

series_title: Security Card Database to DAS Controlled Parking Garages
series_description: Electronic files containing dates and times when security access card is used at restricted entry and exit points to parking garages controlled by DAS.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in system for 30 days

series_description: Digital video records used to record daily activity at entrance and exit doors and select interior locations within buildings owned or leased by DAS.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 30 days or until capacity of storage device requires overwriting.

series_description: All records relating to payment cardholder accounts, including: payment cardholder applications, information forms, agreements, change requests, and any other records that relate to the payment cardholder account. This does not include transactional documentation.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain electronically for 5 years after the card is inactivated ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically

series_description: Series contains originals of 1199 and SCOPE/OEA (State Council of Professional Educators/Ohio Educators Association) employee applications for tuition reimbursement. Copies of course material needed, copies of proof of payment and book receipts, copies of attendance and/or grades, copies of all correspondence between agency and employee, also copy of payment voucher.
retention_statement: Paper: Keep in office for five years plus current year ; Electronic: Keep in office for five years plus current year

series_description: Series contains the original deposits and invoices for Pay Agency Funds and Fund 1240.
retention_statement: Electronic: Keep in office for (10) years plus the current year

series_description: The paper or electronic series of any discipline, issue or WOC grievance case may include a grievance appeal sheet and grievance form from the grievant, OCB computerized I.D. sheet, agency Step 3 answer, copy of OCB Step 4 answer, certified receipt and return reply card, and arb. request from union. Other documentation may include witness interviews, termination reviews and other data pertinent to the case. Settled cases contain a copy of the settlement signed by grievant or his union rep and OCB. Withdrawn cases contain a copy of the settlement signed by grievant or union rep and OCB. Expired cases contain documentation signed by OCB verifying expiration of time lines. Arbitrated cases may contain exhibits or briefs, but does not include the arbitration award and opinion. The electronic series consists of a grievance form from the grievant, agency and/or Alternative Dispute Resolution(ADR) response(s) and applicable closing paperwork and other attachments added by the grievant and agency responders.
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain until closed. After closure, keep onsite for seven years from date closed ; Electronic: Maintain until closed. After closure, keep in electronic system for seven years from date closed

series_description: The arbitration award and opinion for any grievance that went to main panel arbitration. All other documents associated with the grievance are covered under OCB-5.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in electronic file permanently. ; Paper: Retain in office area permanently.

series_description: Drafts of proposals and contracts for each bargaining unit that are produced at various stages in the negotiations process. Files may be in electronic form or paper. Proposals are in draft form until they are provided to the other party in negotiations. Contract draft may be produced for housekeeping reviews. After each revision, the old draft must be destroyed.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area until superseded by revised drafts ; Electronic: Retain in office area until superseded by revised drafts

series_description: Documentation submitted to the Office of Collective Bargaining requesting to change the civil service status of a filled position in accordance with State Policy, as well as notes, correspondence, and any communications regarding parity and overtime requests.
retention_statement: Paper: Until no longer of historical value. ; Electronic: Until no longer of historical value.

series_description: Record of State of Ohio employee training within the Statewide Learning Management System.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 7 years after employee separates employment ; Paper: Retain for 7 years after employee separates employment

series_description: Contains the history of MARCS towers placed on state or personal property that are used by emergency responders, hospitals, schools, daycare centers, etc. Document include the tower lease, and may include the memorandum of understanding used to adjust the contract, land or warrant deed, co-locater agreements, tower drawings, land and site surveys, structural analysis, applications, contract request forms, renewal and maintenance letters, vendor correspondence and email.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until stored electronically ; Electronic: Keep information five years past the end of the tower lease

series_description: Contains subscriber agreement forms, addendums to existing agreements, radio add device forms, and correspondence to and from subscribers for leased radio systems by county.
retention_statement: Electronic: Keep information 5 years past the end of the subscriber agreement ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically

series_description: Weekly card reader reports of employee card swipes to Computer Room.
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain records for 10 years to meet federal requirements

series_description: This record series contains all electronic databases and tables generated and retained in the Multi-Agency Radio Communications System (MARCS) Computer Aided Dispatch (CAD) system. Some data included in these tables are agency incident data, LEADS transaction data only, and unit/radio Automated Resource Locator (ARL) data.
retention_statement: Electronic: Records will be purged daily on a rolling three (3) year schedule ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically

series_description: Consist of Billing Reports listing total jobs, total impressions, agency, and total cost on a monthly basis.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper documents until electronically scanned ; Electronic: Retain for four (4) years in operating systems (Slingshot, Prisma, DFWorks)

series_description: Formal communications to or from Labor Unions or Agencies concerning labor issues, contract interpretation, or the State’s position signed by the Deputy Director of Collective Bargaining or designee.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area for six years or until expiration whichever is later ; Electronic: Retain in electronic file for six years or until expiration whichever is later

series_title: Drug Free Workplace Forms & Negative Testing Results
series_description: Consists of Federal & State Negative Drug/Alcohol Results, Chain of Custody Forms, & "No Test” (requested tests that could not be completed for reasons such as insufficient sample, damaged specimen during transport, Agency ordered incorrect test).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain current year and one previous year ; Electronic: Retain current year and one previous year

series_description: Personnel file documents, including: Anonymous List/Layoff List (Employee file), Application Certification, Background Check, Civil Service Application, Computer/Network Access, Disability Separation Agreement, Discipline, Drug Testing Acknowledgement, electronic or paper evaluations, Exit Checklist, Fraud Hotline Acknowledgement (HV66), Human Trafficking Acknowledgement, Letters/Correspondence (HR related), Licensure, Certifications, Military Leave forms, New Hire/Orientation/Policy Acknowledgements, OAKS ID form, Retirement forms, Outside Employment, Performance Appraisals, Poll Workers forms, Position Descriptions (Employee file), Pre-Employment packet, Prior Service Form & Information, Promotion/HQ Change/Changes in Position Acknowledgement, Reference Checks, Resume/CV, Cover Letter, Security Access form, Separation/Acceptance letters, Statement Concerning Your Employment Not Covered by Social Security, Supplemental Employment Agreement, Supplemental Nepotism Statement (ADM 4173), Training/Education/Workforce Development documents, Unclassified Services Explanation & Acknowledgement, Unemployment Compensation, electronic or paper Personnel Actions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned electronically ; Electronic: Retain 7 years from effective date of employee separation

series_description: Media previously available to the public that once conveyed individual agency information in lieu of oral communication that no longer serves an administrative purpose. This includes, but is not limited to, written website content, files, and images which are no longer accessible to the public (i.e unused, expired, deleted), are no longer relevant to the purpose of the agency, or, classify as informal, temporary, routine correspondence, and/or social media posts. All website media which fit this description will be maintained and accessible in production systems for one year.
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain media in production system for one year

series_description: Employees Assistance Program (EAP) Participation Agreements, Ohio Employee Assistance Program (OEAP) confirmation letters, disciplinary settlement agreements & case notes, for participation agreements administered by DAS SHRD.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 5 years

series_description: This series contains Personnel Actions and attachments may contain documents listed in GP-O-02 for all State of Ohio employees.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 30 years from effective date of employee separation ; Paper: Retain 30 years from effective date of employee separation

series_description: Documents pertaining to cancelled solicitations, including, but not limited to : the RFP/ITB, checklists, scoring, submitted proposals/bids.
retention_statement: Electronic: On network drive or in OhioBuys for 1 calendar year after cancellation ; Paper: Destroyed once solicitation is cancelled and all documents scanned to network drive.

series_description: Log which tracks public records requests
retention_statement: Electronic: Current fiscal year plus two fiscal years

series_description: Log which tracks protests
retention_statement: Electronic: Current fiscal year plus two fiscal years

series_description: Documents pertaining to surplus property, including, but not limited to: Turn-In form which documents asset and serial numbers, agency contact, description of items and condition of asset. Follows GAR-OES-11
retention_statement: Electronic: Retained in Salesforce for life of the application ; Paper: Retain 3 years after property is disposed of

series_title: OAKS Retired Asset Transactions and Backup Documentation
series_description: Details of retired asset transactions and documents authorizing disposal investigation results and disposal records. Follow GF-WV-07
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until scanned in OAKS or audited by State Auditor, audit report is released, and all discrepancies resolved. Electronic: 6 years

series_description: Submitted by agencies when the cost of non-IT purchases exceeds their purchasing threshold.
retention_statement: Electronic: In Request to Purchase system for life of the application.

series_description: For purchase of IT products, supplies, and services
retention_statement: Electronic: In IT Release and Permit System for life of application.

series_title: Master Bid Number Log & Master Index Log
series_description: The Master Bid Number Log is used to assign bid numbers for One-Time Bids, Revenue Share, Term Contracts, and Competitive Sealed Proposals.
retention_statement: Electronic: On network drive for 7 calendar years.

series_title: DAS Employee USCIS I-9 Employment Eligibility Forms
series_description: As mandated by the Immigration Reform and Control Act of 1986, the United State Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) I-9 form is used to verify an employee’s identity and legal authorization to work within the United States. The form contains information such as the employee’s name, social security number, date of birth, and employer review and verification of documented identification of the employee. OES inputs form data into eVerify, I-9 form is retained within OnBase.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned ; Electronic: Retain 3 years from date of hiring or 1 year after employment is terminated, whichever is later.

series_description: The series contains records related to project services supplied by the DAS-OIT-Enterprise Project Management Office (EPMO). Project records include charters, change-issue-decision-risk logs, schedules, and other files related to the project. The types of projects are but are not limited to projects relating to DAS service offerings, enterprise initiatives, and agencies, board, or commission-specific projects. Examples of possible projects: Ohio One Network, cloud & data storage services, database, desktop support, hosted server offerings, domain migrations, enterprise IT security, Ohio Business Gateway, and telecommunications. The EPMO provides a copy of the project files to the customer after the project. The customer will manage their project files according to their retention policies. The EPMO is maintaining its project records for institutional knowledge purposes.
retention_statement: Electronic: After providing a copy of project files to the client, maintain in SharePoint and Project Management solution for 5 years

series_description: Records pertaining to Family Medical Leave Act (FMLA), workers' compensation, disability leave, on the job accident/incident/injury, EAP agreements, disability retirement, salary continuation, transitional work program, disability accommodation requests, and other medical records not covered by another schedule.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned electronically ; Electronic: Retain 7 years from effective date of employee separation

series_description: Incoming and outgoing correspondence of agency head dealing with significant aspects of the administration of their offices. Records document major activities, organizational functions, agency history, and includes information concerning agency policies, procedures, program, fiscal and personnel matters.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two years ; Electronic: Retain two years

series_description: Details of accounts payable transactions including: documents authorizing payment of invoice for goods and/or services received; information regarding payments made, supplier, agency, goods/services, backup documentation. All documentation contained in the OAKS Financial System
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain in OAKS for 8 years, per the OAKS retention schedule. ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically

series_description: Controlling Board request forms and other relevant or attached documentation pertaining to operating requests.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until stored electronically ; Electronic: Retain for 4 fiscal years

series_description: Controlling Board request forms and other relevant or attached documentation pertaining to capital requests. This may include additional OFCC forms and approval used for internal processing that may not be included on the public facing Controlling Board website.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for the life of the issuing bonds plus 3 years ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically

series_description: Payroll records and registers documenting employee earnings, wages, and pay, including payroll input records, summary statements, payroll vouchers, payroll detail sheets, payroll history, reports used for payroll reconciliation, payroll processing calendar, child support payment spreadsheet, deposit and withdrawal for child support, mock manual checks, leave separation form, settlement agreements, special retirement breakdowns, repayment agreements, manual check requests, stop payments and reversal forms, statewide leave donation records, people deductions, refunds and adjustments, and buybacks for overpayments
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned ; Electronic: Retain 5 years.

series_description: Records have historical value documenting significant aspects of the operations of the Ohio Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. Holiday Commission (MLK Commission), such as the annual commemorative celebration and awards, calendar, oratorical contest, etc., all of which affects Ohio citizens as a statewide advocate of Dr. King's principles of nonviolence. The MLK Commission strives to carry out Dr. King's dream of service to others throughout the entire year through various events, programs, etc. They are the collective program memory of the MLK Commission and Department of Administrative Services who provides administrative support to the MLK Commission. The files will be useful for research concerning the history of the MLK Commission and its work for Ohio. Records also have historical value if they contain significant information about Dr. King, award winner, and oratorical contest participants. They are often used to conduct research into particular topics.
retention_statement: Paper: Maintain permanently in office ; Electronic: Maintain in operating system permanently

series_description: Records that document any active legal cases to which DAS is a party that are not covered by AL-01
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed ; Electronic: Retain for two years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed

series_description: Records that document any asserted and potentially viable claims against DAS that are not covered by AL-01
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for one year after statute of limitations runs ; Electronic: Retain for one year after statute of limitations runs

series_description: Records used to draft DAS rules
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for five years and six months from the effective date of the rule ; Electronic: Retain for five years and six months from the effective date of the rule

series_description: Records pertaining to requests for public records that are processed through the Office of Legal Services that are not covered by PUR-03
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for one year ; Paper: Retain for one year

series_description: Records pertaining to subpoenas
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for one year ; Electronic: Retain for one year

series_description: Legal memoranda, research, notes and correspondence containing analysis and advice on issues.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for three years, unless covered by a more specific Office of Legal Services retention schedule ; Electronic: Retain for three years, unless covered by a more specific Office of Legal Services retention schedule

series_description: Files relating to the filing of financial disclosure statements with the Ohio Ethics Commission.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for one year ; Paper: Retain for one year

series_description: Files relating to the drafting of legislation by DAS
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Documents pertaining to all state contracts solicited by DAS that are not covered by PUR-01 or PUR-02
retention_statement: Paper: Awarded contracts: in office for life of contract ; Electronic: Awarded contracts: six calendar years after expiration of the contract

series_description: Routine correspondence pertaining to day-to-day activities of the office. Includes internal correspondence (letters, memos), correspondence from various individuals, companies, and organizations requesting information pertaining to agency and legal interpretations; requests for routine information or publications provided to the public by an agency which are answered by standard form letters, and other miscellaneous inquiries. This correspondence is informative (it does not attempt to influence agency policy).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for one year ; Electronic: Retain for one year

series_description: All informal communications which convey information of temporary importance in lieu of oral communication including telephone voicemail, chats, posts, instant, and text messages, post-it notes, drafts, generic emails, social media posts, and shared departmental calendars. These communications have very little administrative value as they do not set policy, establish guidelines, define procedures, certify a transaction, or become a receipt.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Records containing information related to debarment of vendors and disability leave claims
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for five years after closure of the case and expiration of appeal deadline ; Electronic: Retain for five years after closure of the case and expiration of appeal deadline

series_description: Delegations of Authority of Director to Agency Personnel.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for two years after the delegatee leaves their position or after Director leaves office ; Electronic: Retain for two years after the delegatee leaves their position or after Director leaves office

series_title: Policies, Standards, Directives, Templates and Procedures
series_description: Administrative policies and procedures governing the operation, regulations, and/or procedures of an agency or program, including directives, manuals, and handbooks. Series may include executive level policies and procedures which are used by the head of an agency or executive level office and address agency-wide operations, critical agency functions, or issues of public visibility or concern.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 5 years after revised, superseded, or obsolete ; Electronic: Retain 5 years after revised, superseded, or obsolete

series_title: Joint Legislative Ethics Committee Quarterly Filings
series_description: Files related to the filing of lobbying disclosures for the Joint Legislative Ethics Commission
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for one year ; Paper: Retain for one year

series_title: Electronic Print and Mail Data Files
series_description: Series consists of all types of print and mail data files received by State Printing and Mail Services relating to the operation of various State Agencies, Boards, and Commissions.
retention_statement: Electronic: 15-60 days

series_description: County 9-1-1 plans filed with the 9-1-1 Program Office that contain information on how 9-1-1 operates in the respective county, including amendments to those plans.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically

series_title: Public Safety Awareness Point Support and Compliance Reports
series_description: Annual reports submitted to the 9-1-1 Steering Committee by Public Safety Answering Points that receive Government Assistance Funds to validate compliance with 9-1-1 Steering Committee rules.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until stored electronically ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_title: Planning and Design Drawings-State Owned Buildings
series_description: Drawings and floorplans for DAS managed buildings; programs of requirements; tenant improvement documents; contractor quotes; contractor bids; construction permits; occupancy data; certificates of occupancy.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until electronically stored ; Electronic: Retain for 5 years after building is sold or transferred

series_description: Commercial leases, addendums and memorandums; estoppel certificates; renewal, termination, holdover, etc. letters; memorandums of understanding; subordination agreements; rent schedules; leased location drawings and floorplans; tenant improvement documents.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until stored electronically ; Electronic: Retain for 6 years after property lease has been terminated

series_description: Easements, leases, license agreements, memorandums of understanding, transfers of jurisdiction, oil and gas leases, subordination agreements, tenant occupant agreements.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 6 years after the agreement has been terminated ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically

series_description: Appraisals, Controlling Board approvals, real estate purchase agreements, board resolutions, Attorney General opinions, contracts.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until stored electronically ; Electronic: Retain for 21 years after acquired property has been sold or transferred and/or agreement has been terminated

series_description: Legislation, bid documents, sale of real estate agreements, Controlling Board approvals, Governor's Deeds.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 21 years after sale occurs ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically

series_description: Worksheets and analysis of rate schedules. These are necessary so that compliance with SWCAP obligations can be achieved.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until stored electronically ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years after completion date

series_title: Other DAS Statutory Duties re: Real Property
series_description: Requests for consent to annex State-owned land; annexation petitions; Director's consent to annexation pursuant to R.C. Chapter 709; correspondence re requests to veto appropriation in accordance with R.C. 163.021; requests to acquire mineral rights pursuant to R.C. 155.29 and related appraisals and offers; and any other records concerning responsibilities concerning real property placed on the Department of Administrative Services or its Director (collectively, "DAS") concerning the implementation of statute outside of Ohio Revised Code Chapter 123.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until stored electronically ; Electronic: Retain for 5 years

series_description: Reports submitted by county 9-1-1 program committees detailing the sources and amounts of revenue expended to support and all costs incurred to operate the countywide 9-1-1 system and the public safety answering points that are a part of that system.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until stored electronically ; Electronic: Retain for 5 years or until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Contains documents relating to constituent inquiries from legislative offices
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 2 years ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically

series_description: Annual reports that DAS is required by the Ohio Revised Code or the Ohio Administrative Code to submit to external sources.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years ; Paper: Retain until stored electronically

series_title: Memorandums of Understanding and Letters of Agreement
series_description: Memorandums of understanding and letters of agreement entered into with a union that modify the terms of the collective bargaining agreement mid-cycle.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area for permanent retention ; Electronic: Retain in office area for permanent retention

series_description: Documentation submitted to the Office of Collective Bargaining related to a request to change the civil service status of a filled position in accordance with State Policy.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area for 1 year ; Electronic: Retain in electronic file for 1 year

series_description: This series consists of the layoff rationale submitted by the agency to DAS.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area for 2 years ; Electronic: Retain in office area or in electronic files for 7 years

series_title: Unfair Labor Practices (ULPS) and Representation Cases
series_description: State Employee Relations Board Unfair Labor Practice charge filing, notice of appearance, exhibits, responses, investigation documents, disiplinary documents, arbitration decisions, grievance related documents and the SERB - Ruling/Decision. State Employee Relations Board Petitions for amendment of certification filings, exhibits, response documents, contract documents, reports, list, settlement agreement documents related documents and the SERB - Ruling/Decision.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area permanently. ; Electronic: Retain in electronic file permanently.

series_description: Materials, including, but not limited to, manuals, handouts, presentations, and other material, prepared and used for training of state personnel, both internal and external.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Consists of log of media requests and any necessary related documents.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in office electronically one year and

series_description: Record of job audits including date audit was requested and date employee forms were mailed.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 3 years from date communicated to parties. ; Paper: Retain for 3 years from date communicated to parties.

series_title: EEO and ADA Claims and Investigations
series_description: DAS internal EEO, OCRC, EEOC, DOL discrimination complaints, charges, allegations; investigative records relating thereto; determinations; that are not covered by LEG-01.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned electronically ; Electronic: Retain 7 years from effective date of employee separation

series_description: Applications and all other records relating to application for employment with DAS by those not hired for the job for which they applied.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned electronically ; Electronic: Retain 1 year after vacancy filled or canceled.

series_description: Records relating to child support orders, wage garnishments, and external wage assignments, except child support payment spreadsheets and deposit and withdrawal records for child support that are covered by PAY-01.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned ; Electronic: Retain for 1 year after order, garnishment, or wage assignment is paid/released.

series_description: Records authorizing agency personnel to request manual payroll checks and to pick up manual payroll checks
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years after superseded.
